title: All the Simple Challenges
description: A challengeable mcmod for modpack All the Simple.
body:
# All the Simple Challenges

**[中文文档](README_zh_cn.md)** | English

A challengeable Minecraft mod for modpack "All the Simple".

## About the Modpack

This mod is an addon designed specifically for the **All the Simple** modpack. It introduces challenge-oriented content that integrates with the modpack's gameplay philosophy:

- **Storage Compression**: The compressed block system addresses storage challenges by allowing players to compact large quantities of common resources like cobblestone and diamond blocks into manageable forms.

- **Resource Scarcity**: Food ores provide alternative ways to obtain food items through mining, adding a new progression path for players who enjoy exploration and cave diving.

- **Progression Depth**: The multi-tier compression system creates meaningful long-term goals, encouraging players to invest time in resource collection and processing.

- **Core Crafting**: The core items (Primary Core, ATS Core, Netherite Nether Star) serve as bridge materials that may connect with other mods in the modpack's crafting ecosystem.

- **Unique Biome**: The Atsc Forest biome adds exploration content with exclusive resources that complement the modpack's world generation.

## Content Overview

### Compressed Block System

#### Compressed Cobblestone
- 9 tiers of compressed cobblestone (1-9x)
- Each tier can be crafted and deconstructed

#### Compressed Diamond Block
- 9 tiers of compressed diamond blocks (1-9x)
- Each tier can be crafted and deconstructed

### Core Items

| Item | Description |
|------|-------------|
| Primary Core | Basic crafting material |
| All the Simple Core | Advanced crafting material |
| Netherite Nether Star | Premium crafting material |

### Food Ore System

#### Normal Ores
- Apple Ore
- Bread Ore
- Carrot Ore
- Chorus Fruit Ore
- Golden Carrot Ore
- Potato Ore

#### Deepslate Ores
- Deepslate Bread Ore
- Deepslate Carrot Ore
- Deepslate Enchanted Golden Apple Ore
- Deepslate Golden Carrot Ore
- Deepslate Potato Ore

#### Raw Blocks
- Raw Apple Block / Raw Bread Block / Raw Carrot Block
- Raw Chorus Fruit Block / Raw Potato Block / Raw Poisonous Potato Block

#### Baked Blocks
- Baked Bread Block
- Baked Potato Block
- Popped Chorus Fruit Block

#### Special Items
- Raw Bread
- Enchanted Golden Apple Fragment

### Biome

#### Atsc Forest
A unique forest biome featuring:

| Block | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| Red Light | Light-emitting block found in Atsc Forest |
| Red Dirt | Unique dirt variant |
| Redlight Block | Craftable block from Red Light |

### Other Features

#### Commands
- `/otp` - Quick teleportation command

#### Paintings
- "That Distant Place" - A custom painting by yangyang8002

## Creative Tabs

| Tab | Contents |
|-----|----------|
| All the Simple Challenges | Main items and materials |
| All the Simple Challenges: Blocks | All mod blocks |
| All the Simple Challenges: Food | Food-related items |

## Crafting System

### Compression
Higher tier compressed blocks are crafted using lower tier blocks in a 3x3 grid pattern.

### Deconstruction
Compressed blocks can be deconstructed back to their components using crafting recipes.
